summary:
Dried blood spot tests in neonates are primarily used to detect inherited metabolic Disorders such as phenylketonuria and maple syrup urine disease through targeted biochemical analyses. These screenings aim for early identification of inborn errors of metabolism critical for timely intervention and management.  

\boxed{\text{A}}
